text.title: Runbook as Markdown with Tagged Steps Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of inc-runbook-as-markdown-tagged-steps. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Runbook step says 'restart the cluster' without tag; agent guesses 'read'; cluster restarts.
`[verify]` step says 'looks good'; silent regression slips through.
Agent edits referenced step 12; downstream consumers break.
